repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
contents_tesim: The hymnographical texts are fragments of kanons including troparia-prosomoia
full_text_tesim: Each folio constitutes half of an original folio. The first and last words of text on each folio are missing
Minuscule bouclée. Titles of hymns in upright pointed majuscule, there are 45 titles in majuscule
The hymnographical texts are fragments of kanons including troparia-prosomoia
